label: Hybrid retrieval & reranking

node.label: Hybrid retrieval & reranking
node.definition: Hybrid retrieval fuses lexical and dense candidates, then reranks them with stronger cross-encoders, listwise models, or task-specific scorers.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Hybrid retrieval & reranking is to connect Sparse lexical retrieval, Dense vector retrieval to downstream capabilities including Retrieval-augmented generation, Vector-search and retrieval services, Neural search, RAG & question answering.
examples: substrate for Vector-search and retrieval services
substrate for Neural search, RAG & question answering
limitations: Stored or retrieved information can be stale, private, contradictory, inaccessible, or incorrectly ranked at the moment it is needed. Its direct dependencies include Sparse lexical retrieval, Dense vector retrieval.

dependencies.rationale: Hybrid retrieval & reranking stores, selects, or obtains information through Sparse lexical retrieval.
Hybrid retrieval & reranking stores, selects, or obtains information through Dense vector retrieval.
Hybrid retrieval & reranking uses Margin, ranking & metric objectives as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Hybrid retrieval fuses lexical and dense candidates, then reranks them with stronger cross-encoders, listwise models, or task-specific scorers.
